additional_rules.name: old-reactive-statement
additional_rules.message: Old Svelte 3/4 reactive declaration ($:) — use $derived() or $effect() runes in Svelte 5
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace '$: value = expr' with 'let value = $derived(expr)'. Replace '$: { statements }' with '$effect(() => { statements })'.

additional_rules.name: on-event-directive
additional_rules.message: Old Svelte 3/4 event directive (on:event) — use standard DOM event attribute (onclick, oninput) in Svelte 5

additional_rules.name: export-let-prop
additional_rules.message: Old Svelte 3/4 prop syntax (export let) — use $props() rune in Svelte 5
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace 'export let propName' with destructured $props(): 'let { propName } = $props()'.

additional_rules.name: hardcoded-color-value
additional_rules.message: Hardcoded color value — use CSS custom properties (var(--color-*))
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace hardcoded colors with CSS custom properties defined in your global stylesheet. Example: replace #3b82f6 with var(--color-primary).

additional_rules.name: effect-without-cleanup
additional_rules.message: $effect creates a subscription/timer/listener but does not return a cleanup function — potential memory leak
additional_rules.fix_hint: Return a cleanup function from $effect: $effect(() => { const id = setInterval(...); return () => clearInterval(id); }).

additional_boundaries.name: Shared components must not import from feature components
